nl_query: Which boards have all scripts scanned but less than 80 percent of those scripts have been assigned to evaluators, and show the course code, total scripts, assigned count, and assignment gap.
failed_sql:
SELECT b.course_id, b.exam_id, b.code AS academic_unit_code, COUNT(a.id) AS total_scripts, COUNT(sa.id) AS assigned_count, (COUNT(a.id) - COUNT(sa.id)) AS script_assignment_gap
FROM   board b
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache es ON es.id = b.exam_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = es.course_id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.course_id = au.id
LEFT   JOIN script_assignment sa ON sa.script_id = a.id AND sa.is_active = TRUE
WHERE  b.status = 'EVAL_IN_PROGRESS'
GROUP  BY b.course_id, b.exam_id, b.code
HAVING COUNT(a.id) - COUNT(sa.id) > 0
  AND  COUNT(a.id) * 0.8 <= COUNT(sa.id)
ORDER  BY script_assignment_gap DESC
LIMIT  100;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): board.code, board.code, exam_schedule_cache.id. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
